batch_size.description: Number of designs to generate in one batch (each batch can run in parallel)

rfdiffusion_contig.description: The contig map string to pass to contigmap.contigs, e.g. 'A52-156/0 50-60' for binder design or 'A20-30/10-20/A40-50' for scaffold design

rfdiffusion_num_designs.description: Number of backbones to generate with RFdiffusion

hotspot.description: Binding hotspot for RFdiffusion and downstream evaluation, including chain ids e.g. C123,C124

backbone_filters.description: Hard filters applied on RFdiffusion backbones in Backbone metrics step, e.g. 'N_contact_hotspots>5,pydssp_helix_percent<50'

mpnn_fastrelax_cycles.description: Number of relax cycles. Each cycle will produce one sequence, plus one for the initial MPNN design

mpnn_num_sequences.description: Number of sequences per backbone to generate with ProteinMPNN

mpnn_run_parameters.description: Additional CLI arguments for ProteinMPNN or FastRelax

disable_pyrosetta_scoring.description: Disable PyRosetta interface scoring (for binder design)

refolding_tests.description: Comma-separated list of refolding tests to perform. Available tests: TODO

esmfold_fp16.description: Use fp16 precision in ESMFold (faster, less memory, potentially less accurate)
